tried_strategies.goal: G1 과적합 검증 + 일반화 수정 (word-boundary verbs + deep grep _is_decision() 제거)
G1 일반화 수치 완성 — CTX 59-query + Flask + Requests 교차 검증 완전 비교표

known_facts: G1 overfitting root cause: _is_decision() biased to CTX-domain keywords (benchmark/eval/iter/CONVERGED)
Flask commits fail _is_decision() because they use descriptive language (relax type hint, request context tracks...) not CTX-style keywords
_DECISION_VERBS_RE with word-boundary regex: \badd\b does NOT match 'address' or 'additional' — safe to use
Pass 0 deep grep: removing _is_decision() gate allows surfacing general-project commits via keyword grep
BM25 cross-domain: scores=0.0000 for all CTX commits on CSS/React/Docker queries → stable sort → no harmful reordering
CTX 59-query closed-set: n30+BM25+grep = 0.525 (vs n15=0.000, original baseline 0.169)
Age bucket: 0-7d = 0.467 (n=45), 7-30d = 0.714 (n=14) — 0-7d is the largest gap
Requests benchmark = 0.000 due to ground truth construction limitation (old external commits, not hook failure)
BM25 graceful degradation: zero-score → stable sort → recency order preserved for unrelated queries

uncertain.question: What is the structural reason for 0-7d=0.467 vs 7-30d=0.714?
uncertain.status: unmeasured — need miss pattern analysis (keyword mismatch / commit ambiguity / vocab gap)

uncertain.question: Can multi-keyword OR grep improve 0-7d recall from 0.467 to 0.55+?
uncertain.status: untried — depends on miss pattern classification

uncertain.question: Is 0.525 the practical ceiling for CTX git-memory approach?
uncertain.status: unknown — need miss analysis to determine how many misses are structural vs fixable

her_hints.sub_goal: Verify Requests/Django generalization AND re-run CTX original 12-query benchmark with new _is_decision()
Pass 0 deep grep gate removal was the key insight — apply similar gate removal analysis to other pipeline steps
